posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Would it be possible to configure the AI ​​configuration for columns when the action is custom, and emails (example1@gmail.com; example2@gmail.com) are extracted from a reflection column (Text), and when passed through AI, it uses the separation of ; since it doesn’t have… it only displays the emails separately and with a space, and this way the emails aren’t sent to all recipients.
